purpose: Update the AP16I positive-survivor smoke emitter to expose SourcePositionRowProducerGoodCoverageOnRange before deriving all-Good coverage.

focused_build.command: python3 scripts/run_memory_guarded.py --max-tree-rss-mib 12000 --min-available-mib 4096 --poll-seconds 0.5 --json /tmp/cuboctahedron_ap16av_generated_source_position_guard.json -- bash -lc 'export LEAN_NUM_THREADS=1; export LAKE_JOBS=1; timeout 180s lake build Cuboctahedron.Generated.Translation.TwoSource.SupportFamilies.PositiveSurvivorMembershipGeneratedSmoke'

decision: Accepted as the new tiny generated smoke shape. It does not solve global membership, but it proves the generator can target the source-position coverage surface rather than concrete positive-mask candidate facts.
